title: Workflow list view — filter, paginate, query
purpose: Give the operator the entry point of the dashboard: a filterable, paginated list of workflows backed by the server's query API, with the production states a real console needs.
task: Build the workflow-list feature: a TanStack Query hook over the query API, a filter bar (type, status, time range), pagination against the server's contract, and a list of rows that link to the detail view — with explicit loading, empty, and error states.

requirements.title: Query hook and list rendering
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL load workflow summaries via TanStack Query against the query API and render them as rows showing id, type, status, and start/end time, each linking to the detail view.
acceptance: src/features/workflow-list/hooks/useWorkflowQuery.ts wraps the api client's queryWorkflows in a TanStack Query keyed by filter + page + namespace.
WorkflowList renders a WorkflowRow per WorkflowSummary showing id, type, a StatusBadge, and start/end time.
The hook returns query state (loading/error/data) for the view to render states from.
A render test with a mocked client shows rows for a returned page.

requirements.title: Filter bar and pagination
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL provide a filter bar filtering by workflow type, status, and time range that drives the query, and pagination against the server's pagination contract that never loads full histories.
acceptance: FilterBar exposes type (text/select), status (WorkflowStatus select), and a time-range control; changing any updates the WorkflowFilter driving the query.
Pagination renders next/previous (or load-more) using the client's pagination contract and resets to the first page when the filter changes.
The list requests only summaries (query API), never per-workflow histories.
A test changing a filter asserts the query is re-issued with the new WorkflowFilter and pagination resets.

requirements.title: Loading, empty, and error states
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL render explicit loading (skeleton rows), empty (no workflows match this filter), and error (cause plus retry) states for the list, distinct from one another.
acceptance: While loading, the list shows layout-reserving skeleton rows (the shared LoadingSkeleton), not a bare spinner.
When the query returns no rows, the shared EmptyState renders 'no workflows match this filter'.
On query error, the shared ErrorState renders the cause and a retry affordance that re-runs the query.
A test asserts each of the three states renders for the corresponding query state.

boundaries: SHALL NOT add live row updates — that is AU-009 (this brief provides the query-driven list it patches).
SHALL NOT build the detail/timeline view — AU-005.
SHALL NOT define the namespace selector — AU-006 (this brief consumes the selected namespace in its query key).
SHALL NOT define the shared EmptyState/ErrorState/LoadingSkeleton/StatusBadge components — AU-008 (this brief consumes them).
verification: bun test passes for the list view tests.
No lint-disable comments added; the list never fetches full histories.
